features: Value Christmas Wrapping Paper Set: Includes 12 sheets of red and green Christmas wrapping paper, each measuring 70 x 50cm, adding a festive touch to your gifts. Comes with 10 gift tags and 2 rolls of 10m natural jute string for perfect decoration.
Unique Design: 6 designs with 2 sheets each - including Santa, Christmas tree, snowflake, candy cane, reindeer, and gingerbread - immerse your gifts in a vibrant Christmas spirit.
Excellent Quality: Made of 100gsm recyclable brown kraft paper, this Xmas wrapping paper is durable, tear-resistant, and eco-friendly. Precise printing enhances the overall appearance of your gifts.

Versatile Applications: These Christmas wrapping paper sheets are not only perfect for Christmas gifts but also great for gift bags, book covers, DIY crafts, or even table covers. Get creative with how you use them!
Warm Reminder: To facilitate handling and storage, each Christmas gift wrapping paper is carefully folded. Please note that there may be creases due to folding before purchase.
description: Product Description Red and Green Christmas Wrapping Paper with Tags & Strings 12 sheets of red and green Christmas wrapping paper bursting with classic holiday charm, bringing vibrant energy to every gift. 6 Classic Christmas Designs Featuring Santa Claus, Christmas trees, snowflakes, candy canes, reindeer, and gingerbread, these festive patterns will add fun and joy to your gifts. Complete Decorations for Perfect Gifts 2 Rolls ├Ч 10m Jute String Can be used to tie up the parcel or simply as decoration. 10 Christmas Gift Tags Tie them to the package to express love and sincerity. Easy Wrapping, Multiple Options Each 70 x 50cm sheet of thick kraft paper is durable and perfect for medium and small gifts. The brown kraft material adds a premium, rustic feel. Wrap with Care, Spread the Warmth A gift is more than just an objectтАФit's the thought behind it. Show your love and holiday spirit with beautifully wrapped presents.
